ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transit_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transit line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the transit line */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation (e.g., bus, light rail, commuter rail) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transit line */,
  "operating_since" TEXT /* Date when the transit line started operating */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the line (e.g., active, under maintenance) */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Average frequency of vehicles per hour */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Peak hours of operation (e.g., 06:00-09:00, 16:00-19:00) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transit line this route belongs to */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "route_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of the route (e.g., clockwise, counterclockwise) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Total distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "travel_time" TEXT /* Average travel time for the route */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the route information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES transit_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the stop */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stop (e.g., intersection, landmark) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available at the stop (e.g., shelter, bench, ticket vending machine) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the stop */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the stop */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility features (e.g., wheelchair accessible, audio announcements) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stop information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route this schedule belongs to */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule */,
  "headway" INTEGER /* Headway (time between vehicles) in minutes */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., regular, express, night) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the schedule was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_times" (
  "stop_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop time */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule this stop time belongs to */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop this stop time belongs to */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time at the stop */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time from the stop */,
  "is_pickup_only" INTEGER /* Indicates if the stop is only for pickups */,
  "is_dropoff_only" INTEGER /* Indicates if the stop is only for dropoffs */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stop time information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_times_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_times_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "realtime_arrivals" (
  "arrival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrival */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop this arrival belongs to */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle making the arrival */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time at the stop */,
  "delay" INTEGER /* Delay in minutes (positive for late, negative for early) */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time based on real-time data */,
  "is_delayed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vehicle is delayed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the arrival information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realtime_arrivals_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realtime_arrivals_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transit line this vehicle operates on */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., bus, train) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Last maintenance date */,
  "next_maintenance" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES transit_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transit line affected by the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., accident, weather) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the incident */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact on transit operations (e.g., service disruption, delays) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the incident information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES transit_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ridership" (
  "ridership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ridership record */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route this ridership record belongs to */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "boardings" INTEGER /* Number of boardings */,
  "alightings" INTEGER /* Number of alightings */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the ridership data */,
  "total_ridership" INTEGER /* Total number of riders (boardings + alightings) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the ridership data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ridership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ridership_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)
